footer.companyInfo: A product of MCA SRL, Romania

hero.title: Design Your Modular Home in Minutes
hero.subtitle: The first end-to-end platform for modular wooden homes in Romania and the Netherlands. Design with our 3×3m module system, get AI renders, technical drawings, and cost estimates — then connect with certified builders.

features.label: Platform Core
features.title: The Architect's Toolkit
features.subtitle: Advanced simulation meets intuitive spatial planning for the modern builder.

land.title: Interactive Land Designer
land.description: Import topographic data and simulate sun paths to optimize your home's placement.

modular.title: Modular Layout System
modular.description: Drag and drop 3x3m modules. Smart-connect technology ensures structural feasibility.

visualization.title: Real-time Visualization
visualization.description: Experience your design in photorealistic 3D rendering as you build, in any lighting condition.

howItWorks.title: From Blueprint to Reality
howItWorks.subtitle: A streamlined three-step journey to your perfect modular dwelling.

step1.title: Choose Your Land
step1.description: Upload coordinates or select from our verified eco-partnerships globally.

step2.title: Design & Visualize
step2.description: Utilize our module catalog to craft layouts that breathe with the environment.

step3.title: Build & Connect
step3.description: We handle manufacturing and local assembly in under 90 days from approval.

pricingTeaser.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricingTeaser.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more. No hidden fees.

finalCta.heading: Ready to evolve your living space?

forBuilders.label: Partners
forBuilders.title: For Builders & Architects
forBuilders.description: Join our network of certified modular builders. Receive qualified leads, manage client projects, and grow your business with our professional tools.

fast.title: Fast
fast.description: From blank canvas to permit-ready design in under 1 hour.

ai.title: AI-powered
ai.description: 15 AI render engines, Neufert-based consultant, intelligent suggestions.

compliant.title: EU-compliant
compliant.description: Built-in regulatory checks for Romania, Netherlands, Germany, France, Belgium.

cta.final: Start your modular home design today — 3 months Premium free during beta.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy

terms.title: Terms of Service

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more power.

beta.banner: Beta bonus: 3 months Premium free for all new accounts
beta.daysLeft: You have Premium features free for {days} more days!
beta.bonusDescription: All new free accounts get Premium-level features for 3 months during our beta phase. Design with HD renders, all drawings, PDF export, and more — completely free. After 3 months, choose to upgrade or continue with the Explorer plan.

free.label: Explorer
free.description: Design your first modular home for free. Upgrade anytime.

premium.label: Premium
premium.description: Full design experience. Everything to plan your modular home.

architect.label: Architect
architect.description: Professional toolkit. Manage clients, projects, and collaborate.

constructor.label: Constructor
constructor.description: Enterprise solution. Unlimited projects, white-label, dedicated support.

cta.demoMode: Demo mode — instant upgrade, no payment

q1.question: Can I switch plans anytime?
q1.answer: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect immediately.

q2.question: What's the Beta Bonus?
q2.answer: New free accounts get 3 months of Premium features during our beta phase. No credit card needed. After 3 months, you can upgrade or continue with Explorer.

q3.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q3.answer: Credit/debit cards via Stripe. Invoicing available for Architect and Constructor tiers.

q4.question: What's the Constructor plan?
q4.answer: Enterprise solution for construction companies. Unlimited projects, white-label branding, dedicated support. Custom pricing available for larger teams.

signIn.title: Sign in to ModulCA
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to access your projects.
signIn.skipDemo: Skip — try the demo without an account
signIn.demoNotice: Demo mode — accounts are stored locally in your browser.

signUp.title: Create your ModulCA account
signUp.heading: Create your account
signUp.subtitle: Start designing your modular home for free.
signUp.name: Full name (optional)
signUp.disclosure: By signing up you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy. You can download or delete your data at any time.

account.title: Account & Privacy
account.signInRequiredDesc: You must be signed in to access your account settings.

export.title: Download Your Data
export.description: Under GDPR Article 15 and 20, you have the right to receive all personal data we hold about you in a structured, machine-readable format (JSON). The export includes your profile, projects, and renders.

delete.title: Delete Account
delete.descriptionPart1: Under GDPR Article 17, you have the right to request deletion of your account and personal data. We offer a
delete.descriptionPart2: after which data is permanently erased. During the grace period, you can restore your account by emailing
delete.billingNote: Note: billing records are retained by Stripe per Romanian tax law (10 years) but are not linked to your account after deletion.
delete.confirm: Are you sure? This will cancel subscriptions and sign you out from all devices.
delete.success: Account scheduled for deletion. You have 30 days to restore by contacting privacy@modulca.eu. Signing out now...

banner.title: We value your privacy
banner.description: We use essential cookies for core functionality. With your consent, we also use analytics cookies to improve the platform.
